svg.title: MedLynq wireframes
svg.text: Minimal wireframes — boxes show layout, not styling. Six MedLynq Go (mobile) + six MedLynq Pulse (web) + three external surfaces.

g.text: Vikram Singh · NHA Yojana · Query · high · 18d
Raised 16 Jun · ₹40,000 stake · type: missing_doc · age 4d
Expected settlement: ₹3.6 Cr · 38% improvement vs Q1

svg.text: ₹ locked · saved · query trend · cash flow

g.text: CPD-Trust raised 12 queries for 'chemo chart missing' in last 7 days,
across 4 hospitals. 3× normal rate · recommend pre-attach now
CPD-Trust · 47 cases shared by Apollo · this week
ICD-10 · A01.0 → HBP · IH-008 → FHIR · CodeSystem/IH
City Hospital · Ward B1 · Dr Khan
A · Mobile (Go) screens 1–6 — Camera Home is the primary surface. QR + consent step locks the patient identity before any capture (no ambiguity downstream).
Voice notes (4) feed Lynq the same Dx/ICD/Rx fields that handwriting does. Session inbox (5) is the only place "captured but not yet uploaded" items live.
Co-pilot (6) is the upstream wedge — runs in OPD, suggests Dx + required docs before they're missed.
B · Web (Pulse) screens 7–9 — Patient list is the TPA's home. Patient detail consolidates identity + vitals + docs + checklist + risk score on one page.
Document viewer modal (9) is the only place to download originals — every download is audited.
C · Screens 10–12 — Packet Builder (10) is the visible "45 sec query loop" tool. CFO (11) and Network (12) are the upsells beyond TPA users.
D · Screens 13–15 — Insurer mirror enables the two-sided network. Admin keeps integrations healthy. Patient + CFO push surfaces close the loop on visibility.
